title: AN ACT NAMING THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE IN THE CAPITAL TOWN OF BONTOC, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO CAMP LT. GERONIMO F. MONTES

chunks.text:
H. No. 5763; 109 OG No. 33, 5670 (August 19, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10534, May 15, 2013 ]

AN ACT NAMING THE MOUNTAIN PROVINCE POLICE PROVINCIAL OFFICE IN THE CAPITAL TOWN OF BONTOC, MOUNTAIN PROVINCE TO CAMP LT. GERONIMO F. MONTES

Be it enacted by the Senate and

House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress

assembled:

SECTION 1. The Mountain Province Police Provincial Office in

the

Capital Town of Bontoc, Mountain Province is hereby named Camp Lt.

Geronimo F. Montes.

SEC. 2. The Philippine National Police (PNP) shall issue the

necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this

Act.

SEC. 2. The Philippine National Police (PNP) shall issue the

necessary rules, orders and circulars to implement the provision of this

Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect immediately upon its

approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE

JR.

Speaker of the

House

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE

ENRILE

President of the Senate

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives

was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 4,

2012 and February 4, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA

LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B.

BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 15 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO

III

President of the

Philippines
